commit_scope: Rollback the production API front-door flip to the kernel-router after public API traffic returned Traefik 404s, restoring the prior deploy path while keeping the kernel-router available as an inactive shadow overlay.

commands: cd /Users/ursmuff/.claude-worktrees/Coherence-Network/kernel-common-ground-20260608 && curl -sS --max-time 8 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, silences: (.ongoing_silences | length), silent_organs: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | {name,status,detail,last_sample_at,latency_ms}]}'
cd /Users/ursmuff/.claude-worktrees/Coherence-Network/kernel-common-ground-20260608 && git diff --check HEAD^ HEAD && git diff --check
local_validation.notes: Initial public witness before rollback: pulse overall=silent with one ongoing silence; page_vitality was silent with detail 'missing Diversity Index signal'. Public /api/health returned HTTP 404 text/plain '404 page not found'; /api/gates/main-head returned HTTP 404; /api/health-proxy returned HTTP 502/503. Full public deploy verification failed at the API health, SHA parity, persistence, CORS, and pulse checks. The response lacked X-Form-Router, so the observed failure looked like Traefik/default gateway routing rather than a kernel-router local-control 404 or fan-out response. Local rollback checks passed: test_hostinger_api_native_deploy.sh passed, evidence validation passed, diff checks passed, route manifest check passed for production-routes.fk and shadow-routes.fk, and runtime_surface_report.py --json reported total_routes=812, kernel_served_routes=22, kernel_first_capable_routes=23, live_front_door_router=null.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this rollback branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: Production verification is pending until this rollback lands, Hostinger deploy completes, and public API/web/pulse checks pass.

phase_gate.notes: Rollback patch has local proof. CI, merge, deployment, and public witness verification remain pending.

evidence_refs: make prompt-guide passed in /Users/ursmuff/.claude-worktrees/Coherence-Network/kernel-common-ground-20260608 with no blocking risk.
make wellness reported local/static alignment but production probes for /api/health, /api/substrate/shape_health, and /api/views/health returned 404.
Pulse witness returned overall=silent, silences=1, with page_vitality silent due missing Diversity Index signal.
Public /api/health and /api/gates/main-head returned HTTP 404 text/plain '404 page not found'; web /api/health-proxy returned HTTP 502.
scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh https://api.coherencycoin.com https://coherencycoin.com failed during the API health rollout wait with HTTP 404.

bash scripts/test_hostinger_api_native_deploy.sh passed after rollback, proving the Hostinger deployment script preserves provider env and targets git SHA contexts without applying the kernel-router Traefik front-door overlay.
./scripts/check_route_manifests.sh passed after rollback: production-routes.fk and shadow-routes.fk both resolve.
python3 scripts/runtime_surface_report.py --json reported total_routes=812, kernel_served_routes=22, kernel_first_capable_routes=23, live_front_door_router=null.
The rollback reverts e3bdc155, restoring the kernel-router overlay to shadow/inactive mode and removing the production Traefik front-door flip from the Hostinger API native deploy workflow.
